evidence_summary: Neuronatin is implicated in adipocyte biology and obesity-related adipose regulation.
evidence_context: Adipose-enriched gene with reported links to adipose tissue function and obesity; included as the main “down in post” adipocyte-associated component.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: Aggrecan (ACAN) is an extracellular matrix proteoglycan implicated in adipose tissue development and obesity.
evidence_context: ECM remodeling is a recurring adipose-aging/menopause theme; ACAN provides a proteoglycan component of the remodeling program.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: CEMIP regulates adipogenesis and whole-body energy metabolism through WNT/β-catenin signaling.
evidence_context: Links menopause-associated adipose remodeling to Wnt signaling and adipogenesis.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: COL11A1 is a stromal/ECM gene frequently used as a fibrosis/activated fibroblast marker; adipose-derived stromal cells can upregulate COL11A1 in activated states.
evidence_context: Supports an “ECM remodeling / stromal activation” component of the menopause-associated adipose program.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_context: Wnt signaling is a key regulator of adipogenesis; DACT2 provides an interpretable Wnt-modulating component within the signature.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: HSD17B2 participates in estrogen metabolism in adipose tissue and has been studied in the context of adiposity/insulin resistance.
evidence_context: Adipose is a key site of local sex-steroid metabolism post-menopause; HSD17B2 anchors a hormone-metabolism axis.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: MMP3 is an extracellular matrix remodeling protease; estrogen signaling and adipose tissue remodeling/obesity contexts have been linked to MMP expression patterns.
evidence_context: ECM remodeling/fibrosis and inflammation are common in aging/menopause adipose; MMP3 provides a protease component of that program.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: PCSK9 is a lipid metabolism regulator; circulating PCSK9 levels show menopause-associated differences in some cohorts.
evidence_context: While PCSK9 is best known systemically (liver/plasma), it provides a menopause-associated lipid-risk axis marker potentially relevant to postmenopausal cardiometabolic risk.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: RXFP1 (relaxin receptor) expression can be regulated by estrogen.
evidence_context: Hormone-receptor axis gene; included as a mechanistically interpretable endocrine-responsive component.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: SCG2 has estrogen-dependent expression reported in experimental systems.
evidence_context: Neuroendocrine/secretory granule-associated gene; included as a hormone-responsive component (with caution about tissue context).
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: SFRP2 in adipose tissue is linked to fat distribution and estrogen status.
evidence_context: Supports a Wnt/adipose remodeling axis and provides a direct estrogen/fat distribution connection in adipose.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: STRA6 (retinol uptake receptor) in adipose is linked to insulin responses and diet-induced obesity.
evidence_context: Retinoid signaling intersects with adipogenesis and insulin sensitivity; STRA6 provides an adipose-metabolic axis component.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.

evidence_summary: Xanthine oxidoreductase (XDH/XOR) has been implicated in adipogenesis and adipose oxidative/metabolic states.
evidence_context: Provides an oxidative stress/purine metabolism axis component that may track metabolic remodeling in adipose with aging/menopause.
notes: Curated set intended for a SenMayo-like menopause signature; designed to avoid lncRNA/pseudogene/keratin/blood-heavy markers and focus on interpretable adipose-relevant biology.
